case_title: JARGAL SED VS. GIIMAA CRAWFORD et al.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JARGAL SED, ASSISTED IN MONGOLINA BY NASAN ENAKHBAT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS GIIMAA CRAWFORD AND BATOCHER BADAMTSEREN ASSISTED IN MONGOLIAN BY MUNKHSULD JAMSRAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2020 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: HENRY SHAIN, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED, (525)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2020 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. GIIMAA CRAWFORD DOES NOT OWE JARGAL SED ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAR-16-2020. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM: HENRY SHAIN, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED, (525)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jargal Sed for Plaintiff/Respondent opposing party in pro per.
Urtnasan Enkhbat Mongolian Interpreter for plaintiff, uncertified and sworn.
Giimaa Crawford for Defendant/Appellant Moving party in pro per.
Court Certified Mongolian Interpreter Khaliuna Haden is present on behalf of the defendant.
Batochir Badamtseren appears as a witness for Giimaa Crawford.

Hearing is held. Argued by both sides. The Court reviews the previously submitted exhibits. The Court also reviews Plaintiff/Respondent and defendant/appellant's newly submitted evidence.

The newly submitted evidence is returned to both sides. PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument takes the matter under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Henry Shain, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-02-2020 Continued To Sep-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-16-2020 Judgment Entered
